CONTENT.Early life: As a youth player, he joined the youth academy of Italian Serie A side Verona. He was regarded as one of the club's most important players.
CONTENT.Club career: He started his career with Italian Serie A side Verona. He debuted for the club during a 3–1 win over Ascoli. He made his Serie A debut in a 2-2 draw against Inter, on 26 May 2024.
CONTENT.Style of play: He mainly operates as a midfielder, winger, or striker. He mainly operated as a midfielder earlier in his career.
CONTENT.International career: He has represented Italy internationally at youth level. He is eligible to represent Guinea internationally through his parents.

SUMMARY: Alphadjo Cissè (born 22 October 2006) is an Italian footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Hellas Verona.
